summary: Iter 214 end-to-end verified: (1) Retirement Planner page title renamed to 'Retirement · David & Sarah Thompson' and PageShell title 'Retirement' confirmed. (2) Scenario cards collapsed by default with summary metrics + scenario-toggle-base 'Edit details' button (toggles to 'Hide details' and expands Budget tab inline). (3) Projected Portfolio Balance chart bbox y=596.5px (well within 1100px above-fold on 1920x1080). (4) Contribution Calculator unified into single Your Details card at top (data-testid='smsf-inputs') with all 9 number inputs (age/taxable-income/super-balance/employer/salary-sacrifice/personal/non-concessional/spouse/expected-return), ALL type=number, ZERO sliders. (5) Calculate button text confirmed 'Calculate' (not 'Calculate Strategy' or 'Calculate SMSF'). (6) SuperOptimiser no longer rendered in tab (count=0), no 'SMSF Contribution Optimizer' h1. (7) Fill+Calculate hits POST /api/analyze/smsf with non_concessional_contribution=15000 & expected_return=6.5 in query string; status=200; UI shows Projected at 67=$3,265,928 + Non-Concessional Remaining=$105,000 + projection-chart + cap-progress — all matching backend. (8) Backend pytest 3/3 PASS — new params with full inputs, defaults when new params omitted, and only-required-params smoke. (9) All 16 regression routes (incl. /smsf-optimizer) return 200.

tests_executed.page_title_retirement_not_workshop: PASS (h1='Retirement · David & Sarah Thompson', 'Retirement Workshop' count=0)
tests_executed.scenario_toggle_expands_tabs: PASS (text→'Hide details', Budget tab visible after expand)
tests_executed.super_optimiser_not_rendered: PASS (data-testid='super-optimiser' count=0; no 'SMSF Contribution Optimizer' h1)
tests_executed.calculate_posts_new_params: PASS (URL contains non_concessional_contribution=15000 and expected_return=6.5; status=200)

critical_code_review_comments: analysis.py line 423: total_concessional includes personal_contribution but the 'Personal Deductible' field UI treats it as concessional — matches caps semantics; ok.
SMSFOptimizer.jsx NumberField uses type='number' with no min/max validation — negative numbers or unreasonable values (e.g. age=200) are accepted client-side. Minor; backend should clamp.
RetirementHub.jsx still imports 'SuperOptimiser' refs in comment (line 34) — stale comment, harmless.
Caps in analysis.py are FY24-25 hardcoded ($30k concessional / $120k NCC) — fine for now but consider env/config for FY rollover.
test_credentials: No login. LocalStorage seeded: wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent', app_mode='adviser', selected_client='{"id":"thompson_family"}'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 214 UX refactor verified end-to-end. Backend /api/analyze/smsf now accepts non_concessional_contribution + expected_return; defaults preserved for backwards compat (NCC=0, return=7.0). UI: Retirement Planner header renamed, scenarios collapse by default exposing chart above fold, Contribution Calculator unified into one form with 9 number inputs, Calculate posts new params correctly. Pytest file /app/backend/tests/test_iteration214_smsf_params.py is a stable regression suite for the smsf endpoint.
